Fittorin Bladespur  

Monster
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded October 22nd, 2025 by iventheassassin

  • Class: Rogue

Immune to changes in movement speed (ie. Root, Snare).

Attack text:
Fittorin Bladespur narrows his eyes and gives a cruel, sinister smirk of delight as he gives a stunning display of grace in readying his blades, 'How marvelous to find one who invites death so openly. Come, let us dance and allow me the pleasure of delivering you unto the hands of the fate you so desire.'

Death text:
Fittorin Bladespur's corpse staggers for a moment, his blades dropping from his shaking hands. His eyes wide upon his beautiful, marred face, Fittorin gasps one last breath before crumbling to the ground in a lifeless heap.

Categories: Rogue (EQ Mob Class) | EverQuest | Templatized
This page last modified 2025-10-22 05:36:52.

Minimum Level: 32
Maximum Level: 33
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2025-10-22 05:32:44
Known Loot:
Fine Steel Dagger
Fine Steel Rapier
Jaggedpine Panther Hide

Known Habitats:
  Toxxulia Forest
Factions Increased:
  Residents of Jaggedpine +2
Factions Decreased:
  Pirates of the Pine -5
Quests:
  Jaggedpine Druid Boots

Report a correction

Post Comment
faction log of kill
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2016 at 12:25 PM Rating: Good
drool
1,563 posts
[Sun Aug 16 11:17:26 2015] Your faction standing with Pirates of the Pine has been adjusted by -5.
[Sun Aug 16 11:17:26 2015] Your faction standing with Residents of Jaggedpine has been adjusted by 2.
[Sun Aug 16 11:17:26 2015] You receive 7 gold and 8 silver from the corpse.
[Sun Aug 16 11:17:26 2015] Fittorin Bladespur's corpse staggers for a moment, his blades dropping from his shaking hands. His eyes wide upon his beautiful, marred face, Fittorin gasps one last breath before crumbling to the ground in a lifeless heap.
[Sun Aug 16 11:17:26 2015] Fittorin Bladespur is burned by the Scars of Sigil.
[Sun Aug 16 11:17:26 2015] You have slain Fittorin Bladespur!
▲ Page top
not so bad
QuoteReply
# Nov 25 2003 at 3:56 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I took this guy with no problem. I was headed to the book from Paineel when i came up on this fellow. He gave me the old "I'm gona cut you a break" speach, but i didn't feel like cutting him one. He coned DB to me at lvl 39 and having just recieved my new spells i decided to try them out on him. I cast my new pet and gave him only marginal buffs (STR, DEX, STA, and the Poison Attack. I temporarily lost him while cast my pet, but found him again shortly there after. Not knowing about his resists to speed spells, I tried to slow him with Drowsy and imediately sent my pet in to attack. It didn't take as long as I thought it would to kill him and I only had to heal my pet one time in the process. I cast my Ice Speer DD spell twice, and it hit with full effect both times, my pet finished him befor I could cast it a third time, (it is a 30 second recast time). The Fine Steel weapons put a few PP in my account and the XP wasn't bad.


Thisbudsforyou
46th season Beast Lord
Xegony
▲ Page top
Under Con?
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2003 at 11:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765772689
View User Forum
10 posts
I ran into this guy last week. My 43 level ranger had entered the forest from Paineel after hunting in Stoneburnt and goofen off in the Warrins for a little bit. I had no buffs up other than SoW, after all at my level there is nothing in Toxx that can threaten me...Right. Man was I in for a suprise. Any way I start running through the forest and i see the message "Fittorin Bladspur backstabs you but misses." At first I thought I would soon out run him with SoW, but he keeps up with me and keeps swinging. He con's Light blue but I figure I better turn to face him rather than get backstabbed. He hit me for up to 80pts and even quad's me a few times. After several min. I manage to kill him but I had less than 200hp left. Keep an eye out for this guy, he can hit hard and fast and if you are not prepared you may find your self standing at your bind point.

Roshawn Shadowbrook
http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?num=727220
Neverending Twilight
Luclin Server
▲ Page top
Hail!
QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2003 at 6:12 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591789974715
Scholar
258 posts
He was dubiously to me and blue at lvl 35. He was in place of one of the skeletons right next to the Paineel zone. I decided to hail him just to see what would happen.

"Fittorn Bladespur ***** his head to the side and gives a careful study of Outhar. A wicked smirk crosses the corner of his lips, "You do find yourself to be one of bravery, don't you? Aaaah... but you catch me at a fine hour, Outhar, for I am feeling generous and shall let you walk away from this arrogance unscatched. And a little word of advice... back away -- do not turn your back, else my blade may find the opportunity too appealing to resist."

He immediately walked into the forest after saying that. I followed him for a bit but decided not to attack this time (was very overloaded from my haul in the warrens.. silly faction stuff). So I took the book out.

Next time Fittorn... for I was also caught at a fine hour. :)

Edited, Sat Jun 21 07:13:23 2003
▲ Page top
Class
QuoteReply
# Nov 18 2002 at 12:41 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765330366
16 posts
This guy is also a rogue, he backstabbed my 40 druid for 211, and I believe he quad hit for max 71. He also kept up with me in greater wolf form. Tried giving him a snare and said hes immune. He gave me a long chase to the zone. I didn't have any offensive spells up other then snare, so I couldn't do anything but run. I don't understand why they add these high mobs in low zones, and especially give them sow speed and snare invunerability.
▲ Page top
RE: Class
QuoteReply
# Sep 27 2003 at 8:15 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592255564371
31 posts
It is sony's way of saying to us go to hell and let's face it the game will never be balanced right by the zone i cant wait for lords of everquest no fee to pay no online just good old gameing the way it should be

Immune to snare/root
QuoteReply
# Oct 30 2002 at 6:05 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779731844
Scholar
43 posts
Yep, this guy is immune to changes in his run speed.
▲ Page top
Fly Bait
QuoteReply
# Oct 05 2002 at 11:47 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592252323339
28 posts
So there I was, a level 32 troll shadowknight who just finished some hunting in stonebrunt(highly underutilized zone btw), waiting for the luclin port to pop. so i decide to run over and wack the kobold camp that is close to the wizard spires. over by the camp this dude comes outta nowhere and starts hitting me for like 77 damage.
i am oom, but figure "what the hell" so i give him go. this guys really wails pretty hard so i end up having to run with sow. and as i am running off to paineel zone i kick myself cause i think if i had been full mana i could have taken him. i miss the luclin port and have to wait for it to come around again.
later, i am waiting for the port again, this time as a level 34 shadowknight with full mana. I look up and (oh joy!) i see him again. this time i take initiative and pull him over to me with engulfing darkness and proceed to start kicking his ***** right before i kill him the port pops and sends me to nexus.
point is this. this guy has me really PO'd and next time i see him i am going to break him in half.
Grolin

# Sep 02 2002 at 12:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1638750042628

i looted a no drop Jaggedpine panther skin does anyone know what this is for?
▲ Page top
RE: Loot
QuoteReply
# Oct 03 2002 at 6:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768433418
View User Forum
Scholar
46 posts
It is for the druid's "Boots of the Pine" quest which starts in Jaggedpine Forest.

Faction hits
QuoteReply
# Aug 26 2002 at 3:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361476048
22 posts
Gives + faction to Residents of Jaggedpine and - hit to Pirates of the Pine (JPF poachers).
